title: Argentinian Flatbread with Bonito Topping
description: A simple and flavorful flatbread topped with bonito, inspired by Argentinian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Bonito
ingredients.notes: look for bonito in water, not oil

instructions: 2. Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
3. Open the bonito cans and drain the liquid.
4. Flake the bonito into small pieces and place on top of the flatbread.
5. If using, sprinkle flavorful on top of the bonito.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the bonito is heated through.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
